tasks.name: Create SkillsSpiderDiagram component skeleton with Card wrapper
tasks.purpose: Establish component structure with Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, and ChartContainer wrapper before adding chart logic

constraints: Must use ChartContainer for CSS variable theming
Must follow Card wrapper pattern for consistency with other widgets
Component must be client component ('use client')
Title should be 'Skills Assessment'

tasks.input_state: Dashboard page exists but has no widgets. ChartContainer and Card components available from @kit/ui.
tasks.output_state: Empty SkillsSpiderDiagram component with Card wrapper and placeholder div for chart.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component file exists at apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/dashboard/skills-spider-diagram.tsx with Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, and ChartContainer structure.

tasks.name: Add Recharts RadarChart with category labels
tasks.purpose: Configure RadarChart with PolarGrid, PolarAngleAxis, and Radar component for skills visualization

dependencies: RadarChart, Radar, PolarGrid, PolarAngleAxis from recharts
constraints: Use RadarChart from recharts (not custom implementation)
PolarAngleAxis must display category names around perimeter
Chart config must use CSS variables for theming (--chart-2)
Use aspect-square sizing with max-h-[250px]
Include ChartTooltip for hover interactions

tasks.input_state: SkillsSpiderDiagram component skeleton exists with Card and ChartContainer wrapper.
tasks.output_state: Component renders radar chart with mock data showing 5 skill categories.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: RadarChart renders with PolarGrid showing spider web pattern. PolarAngleAxis displays 5 category labels. Component works with mock category_scores data.

tasks.name: Add data transformation from category_scores to chart format

action.target: data transformation from category_scores to chart format

tasks.purpose: Transform survey_responses.category_scores JSONB data to Recharts radar format with proper null handling

dependencies: survey_responses.category_scores structure (JSONB with category names as keys, scores as values)
constraints: Accept category_scores prop as Record<string, number>
Transform to chart format: [{ category: string, score: number }]
Handle null/undefined category_scores gracefully
Handle empty object {} gracefully
Preserve category names exactly as stored (structure, story, substance, style, self-confidence)

tasks.input_state: RadarChart renders with mock data. Component needs real data transformation logic.
tasks.output_state: Component accepts category_scores data prop and transforms to chart format correctly.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component transforms category_scores to chart data. Null/undefined/empty states handled gracefully. Categories display correctly on PolarAngleAxis.

tasks.name: Add no-assessment empty state with Take Assessment CTA

action.target: no-assessment empty state with Take Assessment CTA

tasks.purpose: Display engaging empty state when user has no assessment data with clear call-to-action to start assessment

dependencies: Link from next/link for navigation to /home/assessment/survey
constraints: Use EmptyState component pattern for consistency
Heading: 'No Assessment Yet'
Text: 'Complete your self-assessment to see your skills profile'
CTA: 'Take Assessment' button linking to /home/assessment/survey
Maintain Card wrapper dimensions (don't collapse)
Follow positive, encouraging tone from empty state research

tasks.input_state: Component handles data transformation. Needs empty state for users without assessment.
tasks.output_state: Component displays engaging empty state with CTA when category_scores is null/undefined/empty.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Empty state displays when no assessment data. 'Take Assessment' CTA links to /home/assessment/survey. Follows EmptyState component pattern. Positive, encouraging tone.

tasks.name: Wire SkillsSpiderDiagram to dashboard page
tasks.purpose: Import and place SkillsSpiderDiagram widget in Row 1, Column 2 of dashboard grid layout

constraints: Place widget in Row 1, Column 2 of dashboard grid
Pass mock data initially (loader data comes from I1)
Widget must be responsive on mobile and desktop
Must be blocked by S2072.I1.F3 (Widget Placeholder Slots)

tasks.input_state: SkillsSpiderDiagram component complete with data transformation and empty state. Dashboard page exists without widgets.
tasks.output_state: SkillsSpiderDiagram widget renders on dashboard at /home route in correct grid position (Row 1, Column 2).
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Widget appears on dashboard page at /home. Renders in Row 1, Column 2. Responsive on all screen sizes.

tasks.name: Create unit tests for SkillsSpiderDiagram
tasks.purpose: Add comprehensive tests covering data rendering, empty state, and category label display

constraints: Test normal data rendering with 5 categories
Test empty state displays when category_scores is null/undefined/empty
Test 'Take Assessment' CTA links to correct route
Test category labels display correctly on PolarAngleAxis
Test accessibility (chart has proper aria-labels)
Test responsive rendering (aspect-square constraint)

tasks.input_state: SkillsSpiderDiagram component complete and integrated on dashboard.
tasks.output_state: Test file exists with comprehensive coverage of all component states.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Test file exists with passing tests for all states. Tests run successfully with 'pnpm --filter web test -- --grep skills-spider-diagram'.
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web test -- --grep skills-spider-diagram --run && pnpm typecheck
